languages.text: "Когда мой бедный Гнотек приходил в сознание, он говорил, что видел в медотсеке фигуру Лорда-капитана, объятую светом. Она {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}забрала из тела всю боль{/d}... Ваше присутствие и правда ему помогло". {n}Женщина сжимает зубы, не позволяя переполняющим ее эмоциям вырваться наружу. Автопистолет в ее руках вздрагивает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Когда мой бедный Гнотек приходил в сознание, он говорил, что видел в медотсеке фигуру Лорда-капитана, объятую светом. Она {g|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}забрала из тела всю боль{/g}... Значит, это не выдумка. Вы и правда там были". {n}Женщина сжимает зубы, не позволяя переполняющим ее эмоциям вырваться наружу. Автопистолет в ее руках вздрагивает.{/n}
traits.speaker: MB_MotherOfOfficer

languages.text: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Когда мой бедный Гнотек приходил в сознание, он говорил, что видел в медотсеке фигуру Лорда-капитана, объятую светом. Она {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}забрала из тела всю боль{/d}... Ваше присутствие и правда ему помогло". {n}Женщина сжимает зубы, не позволяя переполняющим ее эмоциям вырваться наружу. Автопистолет в ее руках вздрагивает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}

"When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}

"When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in medbay, clothed in light. It took all the pain from his body... So he wasn't lying. You really were here." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The laspistol in her hands shudders.{/n}

Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}

languages.text: 「私の気の毒なグノテックが意識を取り戻した時、彼はメディベイで光に包まれた艦長の姿を見たと言いました。それは彼の体から全ての痛みを取り去った…だから彼は嘘をついていません。本当にあなたはここにいたのです」{n}その女性は歯を食いしばり、感情を押し殺そうとします。彼女の手に握られたラスピストルは震え上がります。{/n}
languages.original_text: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in medbay, clothed in light. It took all the pain from his body... So he wasn't lying. You really were here." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The laspistol in her hands shudders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「私の気の毒なGnotecが意識を取り戻した時、彼はメディベイで光に包まれた艦長の姿を見たと言いました。それは彼の体から全ての痛みを取り去った…だから彼は嘘をついていません。本当にあなたはここにいたのです。」{n}その女性は歯を食いしばり、感情を押し殺そうとします。彼女の手に握られたラスピストルは震え上がります。{/n}

languages.text: "Zavallı Gnotec'im bilincini geri kazandığında... Revirde Lord Kaptan'ın ışıklara bürünmüş silüetini gördüğünü söyledi. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}Vücudundaki tüm acıyı almış{/d}... Varlığınızın gerçekten faydası dokundu." {n}Kadın, dişlerini sıkıp onu ele geçiren duyguların dışarı taşmasına izin vermiyor. Ototabanca ellerinde titriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Zavallı Gnotec'im bilincini geri kazandığında... Revirde Lord Kaptan'ın ışıklara bürünmüş silüetini gördüğünü söyledi. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}Vücudundaki tüm acıyı almış{/d}... Varlığınızın gerçekten faydası dokundu." {n}Kadın, dişlerini sıkıp onu ele geçiren duyguların dışarı taşmasına izin vermiyor. Ototabanca ellerinde titriyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Cuando mi pobre Gnotec recuperó la consciencia, dijo que había visto a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán en la sección médica, envuelto en luz. Eso {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}le quitó todo el dolor{/d}... Su presencia le ayudó de verdad». {n}La mujer aprieta los dientes para evitar que la emoción que arde en su interior escape al exterior. La pistola automática tiembla en sus manos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Cuando mi pobre Gnotec recuperó la consciencia, dijo que había visto a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán en la sección médica, envuelto en luz. Eso {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}le quitó todo el dolor{/d}... Su presencia le ayudó de verdad». {n}La mujer aprieta los dientes para evitar que la emoción que arde en su interior escape al exterior. La pistola automática tiembla en sus manos.{/n}

languages.text: “我那可怜的诺泰克醒来时说，他在医疗甲板上看见了舰长大人，周身沐浴着光芒。那光{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}带走了他身上所有的痛楚{/d}……您能亲自到场，对他是一种鼓励。”{n}女人咬紧牙关，不让汹涌的情感决堤。她手中的自动手枪剧烈颤抖着。{/n}
languages.original_text: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我那可怜的诺泰克醒来时说，他在医疗甲板上看见了舰长大人，周身沐浴着光芒。那光{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}带走了他身上所有的痛楚{/d}……您能亲自到场，对他是一种鼓励。”{n}女人咬紧牙关，不让汹涌的情感决堤。她手中的自动手枪剧烈颤抖着。{/n}

languages.text: « Quand mon pauvre Gnotec a repris connaissance, il m'a dit qu'il avait vu {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} dans l'infirmerie, {mf|nimbé|nimbée} de lumière, et que {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}sa simple présence avait soulagé sa douleur{/d}... Votre présence lui a fait du bien. » {n}La femme serre les dents pour réprimer les émotions qui menacent de la submerger. Son pistolet-mitrailleur tremble entre ses mains.{/n}
languages.original_text: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Quand mon pauvre Gnotec a repris connaissance, il m'a dit qu'il avait vu {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} dans l'infirmerie, {mf|nimbé|nimbée} de lumière, et que {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}sa simple présence avait soulagé sa douleur{/d}... Votre présence lui a fait du bien. » {n}La femme serre les dents pour réprimer les émotions qui menacent de la submerger. Son pistolet-mitrailleur tremble entre ses mains.{/n}

languages.text: "Als mein armer Gnotec wieder zu Bewusstsein kam, hat er die Gestalt des Lord Captain in der Krankenstation gesehen, umgeben von Licht. Das {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}nahm ihm sämtliche Schmerzen{/d} ... Eure Gegenwart hat ihm wirklich geholfen." {n}Die Frau beißt die Zähne zusammen, um nicht von ihren Gefühlen überwältigt zu werden. Die Maschinenpistole in ihrer Hand zittert.{/n}
languages.original_text: "When my poor Gnotec regained consciousness, he said he saw the figure of the Lord Captain in the medbay, clothed in light. It {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_Painkiller}took all the pain from his body{/d}... Your presence really did help him." {n}The woman grits her teeth, not allowing the emotions overwhelming her to break free. The autopistol shakes in her hands.{/n}
